narrative_beat: Homem de negocios em poltrona de couro, rosto parcialmente na sombra

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an anonymous Canadian businessman in his 60s seated in an oxblood leather wingback chair with cracked patina, face half-concealed in deep shadow, painted in the style of a Rembrandt portrait
subject.focal_point: the shadowed half of the face, only jaw and ear visible
subject.secondary: Pile of legal contracts and a Montblanc fountain pen on a polished mahogany side table.
props: oxblood leather wingback chair with cracked patina

environment.time_of_day: late afternoon, window light from right

composition.foreground: businessman in rich warm classical painting tones (crimson chair, ochre suit fabric)
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white Toronto skyscrapers visible through window

lighting.key_light: window light from upper-right illuminating half the face
lighting.rim_light: warm gold edge on hair and shoulder

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: the chair as throne of invisible power

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
anonymous figure without recognizable facial features
silhouette or contre-jour lighting hiding identity

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
